approvedBy: Steve full steam ahead instruction + Codex senior-engineer Foundation session
notes: Approved as a bounded no-auth Foundation DB monolith split. Scope: extract only FUB lead-source rules/snapshots storage and row mapping from lib/foundation-db.js into lib/foundation-fub-lead-source-store.js, preserve SQL tables, return shapes, actor defaults, normalization, existing public exports, and existing callers. Not approved: broad DB rewrite, schema changes, FUB route behavior, FUB API refreshes, ClickUp integration, Sales listing assignments, hub UI, Strategy Operating Truth behavior changes, source crawl/job/intelligence/shared-comms/agent-feedback movement, Marketing Video Lab wiring, Canva client work, paid-source auth, Meeting Vault Phase B, Drive permission mutation, or request-access emails.
